applied_inline: HIGH-1: explicit body-field parsing in POST /tasks + POST /launch, not silent Object.assign; HTTP-level round-trip test added
HIGH-2: launch-route 409 uses ONLY claimToken (not claimedBy/claimedAt) as trigger; route logs task id + claim metadata on 409; regression test asserts each combo
MED-3: server-side soft-drop of malformed tags / blockedBy shapes (string instead of array); route-test added

MED-4: restrict store.create() write surface to user-creatable fields only (domain, priority, complexityHint, tags, blockedBy). Daemon-owned fields not accepted from create route; test that POSTing claimToken in /tasks body is ignored
MED-5: client tests assert XSS-style chars in domain / leadHandoff.summary render as text nodes (no dangerouslySetInnerHTML path)
MED-6: blockedBy indicator deterministic behavior — unknown ids count as pending (⏳), duplicates de-duped, self-reference counts as pending; tests added
MED-7: explicit allowlist when merging launch body into taskUpdate (not Object.assign); test that unknown field is ignored
MED-8: modal_fields override semantics confirmed by inspection of project-actions-loader.ts; test documents observed behavior
LOW-9: persistence test asserts omitted optional fields are NOT written as explicit keys (especially leadHandoff)
LOW-11: modal submission test asserts createTask payload carries normalized values
LOW-12: grep for FR-03.21 / 'no priority' test assumptions before flipping comment
